youtube_metadata.description: Unexplained historical cold cases, shocking forensic mysteries, and crime files. #shorts #unsolved

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: foggy street dark alley lantern old london
fallback_facts.text_block: In eighteen eighty-eight, Jack the Ripper terrorized London, leaving five victims and <red>dozens of letters.</red> Forensic investigators still debate if the letters were written by the killer or <yellow>sensationalist reporters.</yellow>
fallback_facts.title: The Ripper Letters

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: forensic science laboratory microscope DNA slide
fallback_facts.text_block: Identical twins share the exact same DNA, but they <yellow>do not share fingerprints.</yellow> Fingerprints are formed by physical pressure in the womb, making them <red>100% unique to each human.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Twin Fingerprints
